html:
Exclusive to:

See also: Wigfrid

Battle Calls are seven Wigfrid-exclusive items craftable in the Survivor Items Filter in Don't Starve Together. They can be used to give nearby players boosts to their abilities when her Inspiration meter goes up, and others can be used for an instant effect at the cost of Inspiration. They're not destroyed on use. Attempting to sing a Battle Song without an effect slot free or enough Inspiration to cast the instant effect will result in a special animation being played. The effects are cumulative if several Wigfrid players sing the same song.

Contents

  • 1 Battle Song
    • 1.1 Weaponized Warble
    • 1.2 Heartrending Ballad
    • 1.3 Clear Minded Cadenza
    • 1.4 Bel Canto of Courage
    • 1.5 Fireproof Falsetto
    • 1.6 Dark Lament
    • 1.7 Enlightened Lullaby
  • 2 Battle Stinger
    • 2.1 Rude Interlude
    • 2.2 Startling Soliloquy
    • 2.3 Warrior's Reprise
  • 3 Tips
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Battle Song

Weaponized Warble

“Reduce wear on your weapons by 25% while listening.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Weaponized Warble reduces weapon durability drain by 25% while active. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Sewing Kit.

Weaponized Warble only works for weapons that lose durability by use. It won't affect tools, Darts, the Morning Star, or the Ham Bat. 

Heartrending Ballad

“Wigfrid and nearby allies will heal when fighting. Wigfrid will heal a little more too.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Heartrending Ballad grants extra healing to nearby players when fighting mobs. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Life Giving Amulet.

It grants +1 per hit for players other than Wigfrid, but only +0.5 for Wigfrid players.

Clear Minded Cadenza

“Wigfrid and nearby allies will restore sanity when fighting.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Clear Minded Cadenza gives +1 per hit landed on enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Moon Moth Wings.

Bel Canto of Courage

“Scary creatures seem about half as frightening when you're listening to this beautiful song.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Bel Canto of Courage halves sanity drain auras. This will also halve sanity gain from auras converted by the Bee Queen Crown. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Thulecite Medallion.

Fireproof Falsetto

“Wigfrid and nearby allies will not take fire damage.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Fireproof Falsetto grants immunity against fire damage. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Spittlefish.

Dark Lament

“Wigfrid and nearby allies take 10% less damage from Shadow Aligned enemies and deal 5% bonus damage to Lunar Aligned enemies.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Dark Lament grants Wigfrid and nearby players +10% protection against Shadow Aligned mobs and +5% damage to Lunar Aligned enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 Pure Horror after the Shadow Chanteuse skill is unlocked.

Enlightened Lullaby

“Wigfrid and nearby allies take 10% less damage from Lunar Aligned enemies and deal 5% bonus damage to Shadow Aligned enemies.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.”

-

The Enlightened Lullaby grants Wigfrid and nearby players +10% protection against Lunar Aligned mobs and +5% damage to Shadow Aligned enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 Pure Brilliance after the Lunar Melodist skill is unlocked.

Battle Stinger

Rude Interlude

“Draw the attention of nearby enemies.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.”

-

The Rude Interlude draws attention of nearby enemies towards Wigfrid, turning them hostile. It's an instant effect song, so it costs 16 Inspiration to sing. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Toma Root.

Startling Soliloquy

“Panic nearby enemies.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.”

-

The Startling Soliloquy makes nearby enemies panic for 6 seconds. It's an instant effect song, so it costs 16 Inspiration to sing. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Purple Gem.

Warrior's Reprise

“Revive up to 2 nearby allied players.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.”

-

The Warrior's Reprise revives 2 nearby Ghost Players at once. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 Down Feathers after the Encore skill is unlocked.

Similar to Life Giving Amulet, the players who got revived by the Warrior's Reprise will not get max health penalty.

Tips

  • Clear Minded Cadenza and especially Bel Canto of Courage can be very effective at combating enemies with strong Sanity-draining auras, such as Deerclops, Shadow Pieces, or the Ancient Fuelweaver.
  • Rude Interlude can be useful when fighting Bee Queen, Dragonfly, and other bosses that summon backup, allowing Wigfrid to aggro their minions and protect other players.
  • Fireproof Falsetto can protect the team against fires, an enraged Dragonfly, Lavae and Klaus's Red Gem Deer spell.
  • Startling Soliloquy can be helpful to scare off Grumble Bees during the Bee Queen fight or to prevent Klaus's Gem Deer from casting magic for a time.
  • Heartrending Ballad works well with the Bat Bat to leech health every time Wigfrid hits a foe.

Trivia

  • The Dark Lament, Enlightened Lullaby and Warrior's Reprise were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.

Gallery

  • Battle Songs concept art from Rhymes With Play #278.
  • Unused Dropattack Battle Song
  • Unused Electic Battle Song
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“I'm afraid I'm not a licensed poetic.”
–Wilson
“Heh. Okay, I'm using that one.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will stick to lifting and punching.”
–Wolfgang
“I only like tragedies.”
–Wendy
“I CARE FOR FICTIONAL HUMANS EVEN LESS THAN REAL ONES”

“I can't sit and watch a play when there's wood to be chopped!”

“Funny words”
–Wormwood
“This kind of stuff was more Charlie's thing...”
–Winona
“Oooh, yay! Are we putting on a play?”
–Wortox
“Glurgh... these words really hard...”
–Wurt
“This story could use a few more monsters.”
–Walter
“Insults are so much more scathing when they rhyme.”
–Wanda
“Draw the attention of nearby enemies.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.”
-
The Rude Interlude draws attention of nearby enemies towards Wigfrid, turning them hostile. It's an instant effect song, so it costs 16 Inspiration to sing. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 Toma Root.

title: Battle Calls
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Clear Mobile Infobox}} {{See also|Wigfrid}} '''Battle Calls''' are seven [[Wigfrid]]-exclusive [[items]] craftable in the [[Survivor Items Filter]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. They can be used to give nearby players boosts to their abilities when her Inspiration meter goes up, and others can be used for an instant effect at the cost of Inspiration. They're not destroyed on use. Attempting to sing a Battle Song without an effect slot free or enough Inspiration to cast the instant effect will result in a special animation being played. The effects are cumulative if several Wigfrid players sing the same song. ==Battle Song== === Weaponized Warble === {{Object Infobox |image = Weaponized Warble Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Weaponized Warble |icon= Weaponized Warble.png|Ready Weaponized Warble Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Sewing Kit |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |description = Give weapons more time in the spotlight. |perk = Weapon durability drains 25% slower |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_durability"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = The nötes döth imbue my weapöns with their sharpness! |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Reduce wear on your weapons by 25% while listening.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Weaponized Warble''' reduces weapon durability drain by 25% while active. It can be crafted using 1 [[Papyrus]], 1 [[Feather Pencil]], and 1 [[Sewing Kit]]. Weaponized Warble only works for weapons that lose durability by use. It won't affect tools, [[Blow Dart|Darts]], the [[Morning Star]], or the [[Ham Bat]].  {{Clear}} === Heartrending Ballad === {{Object Infobox |image = Heartrending Ballad Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Heartrending Ballad |icon = Heartrending Ballad.png|Ready Heartrending Ballad Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |description = An ode to stealing hearts. |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Life Giving Amulet |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |perk = Grants +1 {{hp}} per attack for nearby players.
Grants +0.5 {{hp}} per attack for Wigfrid players. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_healthgain"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = I will serenade my enemies ön their jöurney tö Valhalla! |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Wigfrid and nearby allies will heal when fighting. Wigfrid will heal a little more too.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Heartrending Ballad''' grants extra healing to nearby players when fighting mobs. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 [[Life Giving Amulet]]. It grants +1 {{hp}} per hit for players other than Wigfrid, but only +0.5 {{hp}} for Wigfrid players. {{Clear}} === Clear Minded Cadenza === {{Object Infobox |image = Clear Minded Cadenza Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Clear Minded Cadenza |icon = Clear Minded Cadenza.png|Ready Clear Minded Cadenza Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Moon Moth Wings |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |description = Give your mind a little choral support. |perk = +1 {{sanity}} per hit landed on enemies. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_sanitygain"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = A stirring battle söng tö clear the head. |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Wigfrid and nearby allies will restore sanity when fighting.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Clear Minded Cadenza''' gives +1 {{sanity}} per hit landed on enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 [[Moon Moth Wings]]. {{Clear}} === Bel Canto of Courage === {{Object Infobox |image = Bel Canto of Courage Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Bel Canto of Courage |icon = Bel Canto of Courage.png|Ready Bel Canto of Courage Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Thulecite Medallion |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |description = Show no fear! |perk = Halves negative sanity drain auras. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_sanityaura"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = A röusing anthem tö inspire bravery in battle! |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Scary creatures seem about half as frightening when you're listening to this beautiful song.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Bel Canto of Courage''' halves sanity drain auras. This will also halve sanity gain from auras converted by the Bee Queen Crown. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 [[Thulecite Medallion]]. {{Clear}} === Fireproof Falsetto === {{Object Infobox |image = Fireproof Falsetto Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Fireproof Falsetto |icon = Fireproof Falsetto.png|Ready Fireproof Falsetto Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |description = Defend against fiery critics. |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Spittlefish |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |perk = Grants fire damage immunity. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_fireresistance"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I once burned my vest before seeing a play. I call that dramatic ironing. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = A fiery perförmance shalt shield me fröm the föul burn öf my enemy's gaze. |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Wigfrid and nearby allies will not take fire damage.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Fireproof Falsetto''' grants immunity against fire damage. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 [[Feather Pencil]], and 1 [[Spittlefish]]. {{Clear}} === Dark Lament === {{Object Infobox |name = Dark Lament |image = Dark Lament Dropped.png|icon= Dark Lament.png|Ready Dark Lament Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |description = Ward yourself and your allies against shadow attacks, and deal heavier blows to lunar foes. |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Pure Horror |multiplier3 = 3 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |skill = Shadow Chanteuse |skillOwner = Wigfrid |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |canBeBurned = 1 |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "battlesong_shadowaligned"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = I shall sing öf sweet darkness. |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }} {{Scrapbook Info|Wigfrid and nearby allies take 10% less damage from Shadow Aligned enemies and deal 5% bonus damage to Lunar Aligned enemies.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Dark Lament''' grants Wigfrid and nearby players +10% protection against [[Shadow Aligned]] mobs and +5% damage to [[Lunar Aligned]] enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 [[Pure Horror]] after the [[Shadow Chanteuse]] skill is unlocked. {{Clear}} === Enlightened Lullaby === {{Object Infobox |name = Enlightened Lullaby |image = Enlightened Lullaby Dropped.png |icon= Enlightened Lullaby.png|Ready Enlightened Lullaby Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |description = Ward yourself and your allies against lunar attacks, and deal heavier blows to shadowy foes. |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Pure Brilliance |multiplier3 = 3 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |skill = Lunar Melodist |skillOwner = Wigfrid |tier = 0 |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |canBeBurned = 1 |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "battlesong_lunaraligned"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Theater makes me fidgety. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = Dö nöt fear, my söng shall shöw us the light. |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }} {{Scrapbook Info|Wigfrid and nearby allies take 10% less damage from Lunar Aligned enemies and deal 5% bonus damage to Shadow Aligned enemies.
This is a Battle Song. Wigfrid must continue to sing for its benefit.}} The '''Enlightened Lullaby''' grants Wigfrid and nearby players +10% protection against Lunar Aligned mobs and +5% damage to Shadow Aligned enemies. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 [[Pure Brilliance]] after the [[Lunar Melodist]] skill is unlocked. {{Clear}} ==Battle Stinger== === Rude Interlude === {{Object Infobox |cooldown = 10 sec (if player have {{PicDark|32|Fighting Words}} for {{Pic|28|Wigfrid Portrait|Wigfrid}}) |inspirationRestored = -16.66 |image = Rude Interlude Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Rude Interlude |icon = Rude Interlude.png|Ready Rude Interlude Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Toma Root |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |description = Throw a verbal tomato. |perk = Taunt nearby enemies. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_instant_taunt"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I'm afraid I'm not a licensed poetic. |willow = Heh. Okay, I'm using that one. |wolfgang = Wolfgang will stick to lifting and punching. |wendy = I only like tragedies. |wx78 = I CARE FOR FICTIONAL HUMANS EVEN LESS THAN REAL ONES |wickerbottom = Oh my, those are some rather colorful turns of phrase. |woodie = I can't sit and watch a play when there's wood to be chopped! |maxwell = My acts were always a bit more improvisational. |wigfrid = A well aimed insult can turn the tide in battle. |webber = We probably shouldn't repeat this one. It sounds rude. |winona = This kind of stuff was more Charlie's thing... |warly = Shakespeare? I wonder how a Viking came upon this... |wortox = Oooh, yay! Are we putting on a play? |wormwood = Funny words |wurt = Glurgh... these words really hard... |walter = This story could use a few more monsters. |wanda = Insults are so much more scathing when they rhyme. |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Draw the attention of nearby enemies.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.}} The '''Rude Interlude''' draws attention of nearby enemies towards Wigfrid, turning them hostile. It's an instant effect song, so it costs 16 Inspiration to sing. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 [[Toma Root]]. {{Clear}} === Startling Soliloquy === {{Object Infobox |cooldown = 10 sec (if player have {{PicDark|32|Fighting Words}} for {{Pic|28|Wigfrid Portrait|Wigfrid}}) |inspirationRestored = -16.66 |image = Startling Soliloquy Dropped.png |canBeBurned = 1 |name = Startling Soliloquy |icon = Startling Soliloquy.png|Ready Startling Soliloquy Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Purple Gem |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |tier = 0 |description = A performance so good, it's scary. |perk = Makes nearby enemies panic for 6 seconds. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack. |spawnCode = "battlesong_instant_panic"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I'm afraid I'm not a licensed poetic. |willow = Boring words I don't care about. |wolfgang = Wolfgang will stick to lifting and punching. |wendy = I only like tragedies. |wx78 = I CARE FOR FICTIONAL HUMANS EVEN LESS THAN REAL ONES |wickerbottom = Ah, how I love the classics! |woodie = I can't sit and watch a play when there's wood to be chopped! |maxwell = My acts were always a bit more improvisational. |wigfrid = My very wörds art enöugh tö make my föes tremble! |webber = The characters talk just like Wigfrid! |winona = This kind of stuff was more Charlie's thing... |warly = Shakespeare? I wonder how a Viking came upon this... |wortox = Oooh, yay! Are we putting on a play? |wormwood = Funny words |wurt = Glurgh... these words really hard... |walter = This story could use a few more monsters. |wanda = It's her delivery that really scares the Dickens out of you. |choose = wigfrid }}{{Scrapbook_Info|Panic nearby enemies.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.}} The '''Startling Soliloquy''' makes nearby enemies panic for 6 seconds. It's an instant effect song, so it costs 16 Inspiration to sing. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil, and 1 [[Purple Gem]]. {{clear}} === Warrior's Reprise === {{Object Infobox |cooldown = 10 sec (if player have {{PicDark|32|Fighting Words}} for {{Pic|28|Wigfrid Portrait|Wigfrid}}) |inspirationRestored = -83.33 |name = Warrior's Reprise |image = Warrior's Reprise Dropped.png |icon = Warrior's Reprise.png|Ready Warrior's Reprise Unavaliable.png|Unavailable |description = Stir the hearts of your fallen comrades. |ingredient1 = Papyrus |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Feather Pencil |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Down Feather |multiplier3 = 3 ({{pic24|Wigfrid Portrait}} only) |filter = {{Pic|32|Wigfrid Filter}} |skill = Encore |skillOwner = Wigfrid |tier = 0 |perk = Revive 2 nearby [[Ghost Characters|Ghost Players]]. |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec. |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "battlesong_instant_revive" |canBeBurned = 1 }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's a very lively tune. |willow = Hey look, fancy kindling! |wolfgang = Stronglady have voice as powerful as her muscles! |wendy = My heart has no desire to sing. |wx78 = FLESHSACKS MAKE SUCH ATROCIOUS FACE SOUNDS |wickerbottom = Musical notation, if I'm not mistaken. |woodie = Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada. |maxwell = No. I do NOT sing. |wigfrid = A melödy lively enöugh to röuse the dead! |webber = We like singing songs! |winona = Opera's a bit hoity-toity for me. |warly = I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer! |wortox = Singing is good for the soul. |wormwood = Biiiig mouth sounds |wurt = Someone drew bunch of flies stuck in Spiderfolk webs, florpt. |walter = This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers. |wanda = Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you? |choose = wigfrid }} {{Scrapbook Info|Revive up to 2 nearby allied players.
This is a Battle Stinger as it completes in an instant.}} The '''Warrior's Reprise''' revives 2 nearby [[Ghost Characters|Ghost Players]] at once. It can be crafted using 1 Papyrus, 1 Feather Pencil and 3 [[Down Feather]]s after the [[Encore]] skill is unlocked. Similar to [[Life Giving Amulet/DST|Life Giving Amulet]], the players who got revived by the Warrior's Reprise will not get max health penalty. {{Clear}} == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Clear Minded Cadenza and especially Bel Canto of Courage can be very effective at combating enemies with strong Sanity-draining auras, such as [[Deerclops]], [[Shadow Pieces]], or the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]]. * Rude Interlude can be useful when fighting [[Bee Queen]], [[Dragonfly]], and other bosses that summon backup, allowing Wigfrid to aggro their minions and protect other players. * Fireproof Falsetto can protect the team against fires, an enraged Dragonfly, [[Lavae]] and [[Klaus|Klaus's]] [[Gem Deer|Red Gem Deer]] spell. * Startling Soliloquy can be helpful to scare off [[Grumble Bee]]s during the Bee Queen fight or to prevent Klaus's Gem Deer from casting magic for a time. * Heartrending Ballad works well with the [[Bat Bat]] to leech health every time Wigfrid hits a foe. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * The Dark Lament, Enlightened Lullaby and Warrior's Reprise were introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wigfrid & Willow|Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow]]'' update. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == RWP 278 Battle Songs Concept Art.png| Battle Songs concept art from ''Rhymes With Play'' #278.
